series_metadata.series_description: Documents requests by eligible inmates for post-conviction DNA testing per Ohio Revised Code (ORC) 2953.71 and 2953.81. The Ohio Attorney General''s Office receives a copy of the request per ORC 2953.73. Application includes, but is not limited to, the following information: defendant/inmate background, conviction background, evidence for testing, acknowledgement to terms and conditions, and certification of services.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: 90 days decision is made. ; Paper: 90 days decision is made, unless scanned and saved electronically
